headline: Jim Cramer on Corteva, Inc.: “I Would Continue to Own the Stock”
summary: Jim Cramer reviewed Corteva, Inc. (NYSE:CTVA) while breaking down 16 stocks for a market facing higher energy costs and economic uncertainty. Toward the end of the lightning round, a caller asked for Cramer’s thoughts on the stock, and he said: Okay, it’s an ag stock. We all know that crop protection and seeds are going […]
